name: StackHawk
description: StackHawk DAST application security testing platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to StackHawk
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: StackHawk → Settings → API Keys → Generate key

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies StackHawk has applications configured for security scanning
